Tests WebMCP invokeTool command with cross-origin navigation.
Enabling WebMCP Domain
Enabling Page Domain

--- Invoking navigate_tool ---
invokeTool response: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
}
toolResponded invocationId matches
toolResponded event: {
    errorText : Cannot return tool results after a cross-origin navigation
    invocationId : <string 0>
    status : Error
}
